hero.title: Keep Your Website Fast, Secure and
hero.description: Professional website maintenance, security updates, and performance optimization services to keep your site running smoothly 24/7.

challenges.title: Websites Are Dynamic Systems.
challenges.description: Neglected websites accumulate plugin clutter, suffer from security gaps, encounter broken links, and gradually slow down, hurting client trust.
challenges.secondaryDescription: At Fillip Technologies, we provide proactive maintenance, automated backups, constant security monitoring, and speed tune-ups.

items.title: Security Vulnerabilities
items.description: Outdated software, themes, and plugins are the primary entry points for automated hacks and malware.

items.title: Layout Compatibility Breakage
items.description: Automatic core system updates can clash with existing plugins, leading to broken buttons, forms, and pages.

items.title: Slowing Performance
items.description: Uncleaned database tables, unoptimized images, and accumulated code junk slow down pages over time.

items.title: Data Loss Risks
items.description: Without automatic, off-site backup pipelines, server failures or database corruption can permanently wipe your data.

whatWeBuild.title: Proactive Services for
whatWeBuild.description: We handle technical updates, monitoring, and backups so you can focus on running your business.

cards.title: Security & Uptime Guarding
cards.description: Constant firewall checks, malware scans, SSL verification, and instant server down alerts.

cards.title: Automated Backup Pipelines
cards.description: Daily and weekly off-site s3 backups, database snapshots, and secure one-click restoration systems.

cards.title: Performance Tune-ups
cards.description: Regular database optimization, caching tweaks, image compression, and core web vitals checks.

cards.title: Content Updates Support
cards.description: Quick turnarounds for adding new blog posts, modifying text, updating products, and resolving layout bugs.

technologyStack.title: Monitored With Advanced
technologyStack.description: We employ automated scanners, security layers, and check routines to protect your web server.
technologyStack.whyDescription: Preventing a security breach or layout failure costs significantly less than fixing a compromised database or system.

security.title: Security Shield
security.description: Firewalls and scanner layers to block brute-force attempts and verify file integrity.

backups.title: Backups & Storage
backups.description: Safe, off-site backup storage pipelines separate from the main hosting server.

monitoring.title: Uptime & SEO Tracking
monitoring.description: Automated tools to monitor server availability and watch out for SEO crawl errors.

caching.title: Caching & Tuning
caching.description: Database optimization and speed plugins to prevent page slowdowns.

process.title: Our Proactive
process.description: We run automated scripts daily and manual review cycles monthly to keep your website in perfect health.

outcomes.title: Consistent Performance and
outcomes.description: Our maintenance plans give your team peace of mind and guarantee a secure, fast visitor experience.
